[2025] 5 S.C.R.  
419
Shri. Masaidevi Vividh Karyakari Sahakari Seva Sanstha 
Maryadit Warewadi v. The State of Maharashtra & Ors.
11.2 That it is not open to the appellant to now seek to by-pass 
the expert Scrutiny Committee by contending for the very first 
time before this Court that the Committee was constituted 
without any authority and/or it lacks jurisdiction to scrutinize 
the appellant’s proposal for its registration as a PACCS.
11.3 That Scrutiny Committee’s Order shows its in-depth 
examination of the appellants’ proposals and the Committee’s 
detailed findings which militate against the eligibility of the 
appellants for registration.
11.4 That the order passed by the State is ex-facie perverse and 
unsustainable as it has allowed the appellants’ registration 
without fulfilling the most basic and mandatory pre-requisites 
for registration.
11.5 That the respondent no. 6, being a member of an existing 
society, is vitally affected inasmuch as the registration of the
